songs.title: F-F-Fun!
songs.lyrics:
[Intro]
F! F! F-f-f!
(fff… fff… fff…)

[Hook]
F! F! F-f-f!
What begins with F?
F-f-fish! F-f-fish!
It's a fish! (a fish!)

[Verse 2]
F! F! F-f-f!
What begins with F?
F-f-fox! F-f-fox!
It's a fox! (a fox!)

[Verse 3]
F! F! F-f-f!
What begins with F?
F-f-fire! F-f-fire!
It's a fire! (a fire!)

[Verse 4]
F! F! F-f-f!
What begins with F?
F-f-frog! F-f-frog!
It's a frog! (a frog!)

[Bridge]
A potato?! (NO!)
P-p-potato! Not F!
(fff… fff… fff…)

[Outro]
F-f-fun! A fun run!
F-f-fig! The fat fig!
F! F! F-f-f!
songs.sunoStyle: dark trap, 68 bpm, heavy 808 bass, sparse hi-hats, deep whisper-rap verses, kids choir chant on hook, playful spooky, minimal, clean vocals, nursery trap
songs.sunoNotes: The F sound is a soft CONTINUOUS /f/ — top teeth resting on the lower lip, air hissing out; you can hold it and hum it. NEVER 'ef' (letter name) and NEVER 'fuh' (schwa). The '(fff…)' drone is a long soft airy hiss riding under the 808. Because /f/ can be held, let the class sustain every initial f. Answer 'It's a ___!' reuses the Week 1 frame.

songs.title: The Fat Fig
songs.lyrics:
[Intro]
(fun… fun… a fun run…)

[Hook]
The fat fig! The fat fig!
Can the fat fig run?
The fat fig ran! (it ran!)
Run, fat fig, run!

[Verse 2]
The fat fig! The fat fig!
The dog ran. The pup ran.
The rat ran! The cat ran!
Run, fat fig, run!

[Verse 3]
The fat fig! The fat fig!
The fat fig is fit!
The fat fig got a cup! (a cup!)
Run, fat fig, run!

[Verse 4]
Fun! Fun! A fun run!
Fun in the sun, sun, sun!
The fat fig ran and ran!
Run, fat fig, run!

[Outro]
At the top… a potato ran?!
(POTATO!)
Run, fat fig, run, run, run!
songs.sunoStyle: dark trap, 68 bpm, heavy 808 bass, sparse hi-hats, deep whisper-rap verses, kids choir chant on hook, playful spooky, minimal, clean vocals, nursery trap
songs.sunoNotes: ONE frame anchor: 'Run, fat fig, run!' repeats as the hook tail every verse. It's a fun-run song — the fat fig races the whole cast and wins a cup (a trophy). Keep 'fun', 'run', 'sun' rhyming hard on the short u the class just learned. 'fast' is oral only. Potato gate-crashes the finish line, once, loud.

spreads.artNote: A single plump purple fig, spotlit, ordinary and dignified.
The fig, now comically ROUND and fat, grinning, with two tiny legs appearing at the bottom. The joke wakes up.
A starting line with a flag; the fat fig on tiny legs at the line beside the cast, all poised to race. Festival banners.
The fat fig sprinting on its little legs, motion lines, absurdly fast, tongue-of-a-fig out.

spreads.text: The dog ran. The pup ran.
spreads.artNote: The Dog and the Pup pounding after the fig; the Rat and Cat just behind. Whole-cast race panel.
The fat fig pausing to flex a tiny fig-arm, showing off, sweatband on. Comedy beat.

spreads.text: The fat fig ran and ran.
spreads.artNote: The fig still running but wobbling, little legs a blur, everyone else flagging behind.

spreads.text: The fat fig got a cup!
spreads.artNote: The fat fig at the finish holding up a shiny trophy cup, the cast cheering. Victory.
The POTATO, tiny legs pumping, wearing a runner's number and its round glasses, zooming past the finish line last but proud. No noun printed — the class SHOUTS it.

extras: Moveable alphabet: build f-u-n, f-a-n, f-a-t, f-i-g — hold the /f/ long before the vowel, then swap the first sound (fan → man → can → pan)
Sandpaper letter f: top teeth on lower lip, feel the air on your hand — /f/ is a sound you can HOLD, unlike the stops
Fun-run relay: a real classroom relay where children carry a fig counter to the finish and read the fig words along the track
/f/ vs /p/ listening: fat/pat, fig/pig, fan/pan, fin/pin — teeth-on-lip (f) vs lips-pop (p)

teacherFocus: Teach the soft CONTINUOUS /f/ — top teeth on the lower lip, air hissing, a sound you can HOLD (unlike the stops the class has been drilling). Contrast it with /p/ (fat/pat, fig/pig, fin/pin): teeth-on-lip versus lips-pop. Blend f-u-n, f-a-n, f-a-t, f-i-g. The fat fig runs a fun run against the whole cast and wins a cup — a joyful decodable romp that recycles the short-u run/fun/sun the class just earned, with the potato crashing the finish.
